mapper.insert: insert into carousel(name, url, img, mbimg, sortID,updateTime, addTime) values (#{name}, #{url},#{img}, #{mbimg}, #{sortID}, #{updateTime}, #{addTime})
mapper.update: update carousel set name = #{name}, url = #{url}, img = #{img}, mbimg = #{mbimg}, sortID = #{sortID}, updateTime = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}

update carousel set isShow = 0 where id IN
#{id}
